articles.title: Offensive stage of Iran war is over, US Secretary of State Rubio says
articles.summary: As a spate of incidents in the Strait of Hormuz test the ceasefire, an Iranian official says, "We are just getting started".

articles.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
articles.summary: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.

articles.title: Russian attacks kill more than 20 ahead of rival ceasefires proposed by Kyiv and Moscow
articles.summary: Kyiv said it would begin a truce on 6 May and then "act symmetrically" after Moscow declared a pause for its Victory Day parade.

articles.title: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
articles.summary: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.

articles.title: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
articles.summary: A 33-year-old German citizen was detained following the incident, the authorities say.

articles.title: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
articles.summary: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.

articles.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
articles.summary: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

articles.title: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
articles.summary: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.

articles.title: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
articles.summary: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.

articles.title: Rescuers among three dead after yacht sinks off Australian coast
articles.summary: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.
